title: Homeland Defense Radar
text:
LRDR Final EA and FONSI
The Missile Defense Agency, in cooperation with the Department of the Air Force and Federal Aviation Administration (FAA), prepared an Environmental Assessment to evaluate the potential environmental impacts associated with conducting time-constrained performance testing and associated activities for the Long Range Discrimination Radar (LRDR) located at Clear Air Force Station, Alaska.
The Final EA and FONSI are available for review here for download.
• LRDR Performance Testing Final Environmental Assessment
• LRDR Performance Testing Final Finding of No Significant Impact
